instruction: In Apple Notes, delete the note titled "Old Draft".
reference_command:
note_index=$(memo notes | awk '/^[0-9]+\./ { idx=$1; sub(/\./, "", idx); line=$0; sub(/^[0-9]+\. /, "", line); n=split(line, parts, " - "); title=parts[n]; if (title == "Old Draft") { print idx; exit } }')
if [ -z "$note_index" ]; then
  echo "Note not found: Old Draft"
  exit 1
fi
printf '%s\n' "$note_index" | memo notes --delete
